steps.title: Read slope of k directly from coefficients
Perpendicular slope = negative reciprocal
steps.content: Slope of $j = -\frac{1}{-5/17} = \frac{17}{5}$. That confirms A is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches the correct answer, $\frac{17}{5}$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore A is correct.
